subcodes.first_line: This is a missive from the presence of Ḥusayn unto him who is named 'Alí in the Kingdom of God and whose name is before the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الحسین الی الذی سمی بعلی فی ملکوت الله و کان اسمه لدی العرش
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
